name: opexia
description: OpexIA developer tooling for Claude Code: instrument any project for observability (native OTLP / opexia-trace SDK / direct HTTP, verified span landing); the CI companions `opexia shipcheck` (prompt/cost PR gate) and `opexia audit` (local zero-egress agent map + security audit); and `pxcore` token compression — imaged-context tools that cut input tokens with a native-vision read, exact content kept as text.
